setting.note: Oxford in a single doomed summer term: the High, the river Isis, the Emperors’ heads outside the Sheldonian. Beerbohm invents a college but keeps the city exact, and it brings Oxford into the atlas.

rights.originalWork: TODO: confirm. Max Beerbohm published this in 1911.
